name: Quality Overlay
description:
Draws clean video quality (4K, 1080p, 720p, 480p, SD) and audio codec
  (DTS-HD MA 7.1, TrueHD Atmos, DD+ 5.1, AAC 5.1, FLAC, ...) badges onto
  poster, thumbnail, and backdrop images in memory without modifying the
  original files. Fully configurable from the admin dashboard.
overview: A Jellyfin plugin that overlays clean video quality and audio codec badges onto poster, thumbnail, and backdrop images..
